overview.summary: This module owns live E2E coverage for the static first-party Pyright LSP provider. It exercises daemon ops `sandbox.plugin.list`, `sandbox.plugin.health`, `sandbox.plugin.pyright_lsp.query_symbols`, `sandbox.plugin.pyright_lsp.definition`, `sandbox.plugin.pyright_lsp.references`, `sandbox.plugin.pyright_lsp.diagnostics`, and `sandbox.file.write` for fixture setup and workspace refresh. Module config lives at `crates/e2e-test/tests/plugin/config/default.test.yml`.

checklist.title: Pyright Health
checklist.description: Static provider listing and health report Pyright as enabled, initialized, running, and bound to a projected LayerStack manifest.

checklist.title: Pyright Symbols
checklist.description: Query-symbol requests return live document symbols from the projected workspace.

checklist.title: Pyright Navigation
checklist.description: Definition and references requests return locations with repo-relative file paths.

checklist.title: Pyright Refresh
checklist.description: Workspace edits refresh the projection and Pyright process before returning navigation results.

checklist.title: Pyright Diagnostics
checklist.description: Diagnostics reflect broken Python files and clear after a workspace update fixes the file.

test.name: pyright_lsp_setup_and_health
test.description: Verifies `sandbox.plugin.list` and `sandbox.plugin.health` expose the static `pyright_lsp` provider, initialized process metadata, capabilities, projection root, and active manifest key.

test.name: pyright_lsp_query_symbols
test.description: Writes a Python file through `sandbox.file.write`, queries `sandbox.plugin.pyright_lsp.query_symbols`, and asserts the live function symbol is returned with fresh analyzer state.

test.name: pyright_lsp_definition_and_references
test.description: Seeds a small Python package and validates `definition` and `references` return repo-relative locations for the target symbol.

test.name: pyright_lsp_navigation_refreshes_after_update
test.description: Moves a referenced symbol to another module and proves the static provider refreshes before returning the new definition.

test.name: pyright_lsp_diagnostics_refreshes_after_update
test.description: Creates a syntax error, verifies diagnostics are returned, rewrites the file, and verifies diagnostics clear with fresh analyzer state.
